title: When They Push Back -- Handling Objections
subtitle: Acknowledge, address and overcome objections
menu_desc: Third conditional & concession language -- turning objections into a win-win
welcome: This lesson you learn to HANDLE OBJECTIONS in English: acknowledge a concern, address it, reassure the partner, and reach a win-win -- plus analyze a lost deal with the third conditional (if we had done X, they would have signed).
